description: Simply, easy. I’m a user of it, not an admin so I think I use it less but it’s helpful to keep track of everything,
author: Brittany O.
pros: Reports are easy to read, easily accessible for printing. All the tabs are smart phone friendly (other platforms I’ve had issues with)
cons: Sometimes the app does an update that causes issues or lags but the people who run it are quick to fix it.

author: Samantha V.
pros: All-in-One Platform Real-Time Data Processing User-Friendly Interface Mobile Accessibility Customizable and Scalable Advanced Analytics and Reporting Strong Integration with other enterprise software Compliance and Security Professional Support Community Engagement David Ossip
cons: constant software enhancement with issues. lack of transparency in fees.

description: It is a love-hate relationship. When it works, it works well, but when it doesn't its a major pain and usually causes me to have to use a workaround which is not what we pay for.
author: Cynthia D.
pros: Having all employee information in one place and the various tasks that you can do on one platform.
cons: It can be very temperamental and troublesome to use. Some of the logic of the operations does not mesh with real-life practices. Some of the things you think should work a certain way do not, and it causes extra work.

author: Elgiz A.
pros: It is very convenient because I can do a lot on the app, example, schedule and payroll. People can see who they are working with and also they can book their vacations through the app.
cons: There is a lot of features that it may take some time for people to get to know how it all works. There's also a bit of trouble when people are clocking in due to the location having errors.

review_title: Dayforce HCM - Efficient and streamlined system
description: Overall, Dayforce HCM has been an outstanding business decision due to immense efficiencies, improvements to employee/candidate experience and streamline payroll. As for All in Ones, Dayforce is and will be the top of lists if I ever am in the position of commissioning a new system.
author: Jamie M.
pros: Ease of use - Extremely efficient system - The Implementation studio is an amazing tool that helps improve employee experience and efficiencies. Has Streamlined payroll processes - Speedy payruns.
cons: Dayforce is complex to configure due to how large the system is. Support can be a little slow but nothing extremely notable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Production lags heavily, and causes impacts our payroll processing pace of completing payroll. We have to slow down to a slow pace as the system is very slow most of the time.
author: Rachel R.
pros: System is very intuitive. amazing product if it is configured correcting and staff is trained fully to use the system
cons: Tax customer service is the absolute worst. they would take money/ach our account without prior approval on multiple occasions. Which breaks our contractual agreement. DF has processes such as sending and ATD to be signed prior to debiting the account however this wasn't followed multiple times. also PII info was a concern. I received and email from DF saying your email config was updated. They had added email to our account of humans that never have worked here. they crossed wires between client and added emails to our email config from some company we have no affiliation with.

review_title: Dayforce is a highly intelligent system with large reporting capabilities
author: Caroline B.
pros: The payroll system is intuitive and reports are robust.
cons: Implementation was incredibly long and the support ticket advisors are usually poorly trained. During implementation we had several different project managers due to turnover. Most of the advisors we have had directly from Ceridian have been so siloed they did not understand how their section of the system effected other systems. This has caused many issues down the line for us. I am still correcting things set up wrong during implementation.

description: Positive experience overall. We were previously using an HRIS that didn't display all of the information we needed and our employees were never able to view it, so using Dayforce has made our employee's experience with their information positive but also provided them with the autonomy they didn't previously have in our old system.
author: Milica C.
pros: It's very user friendly for the end user. I like how everything is housed in one HRIS and I am able to view all of the employee's information in one easy place. The data is visually easy to read and it's conveniently in one place.
cons: The reporting function. Creating reports from scratch isn't that simple for users who aren't familiar with how to create reports. I feel like this could be enhanced and simplified so that creating reports is easier. I also think the number of clicks it takes to do certain functions could be reduced by using shorthand or typing and having the system auto-populate information.

description: Quite good, never experienced any crashing, or it being shut down for maintenance. Like I said very easy to navigate, overall, I recommend Dayforce.
author: Shailyn C.
pros: Very easy to navigate, well organize, and is very secure.
cons: I haven't yet found anything that bothers me about Dayforce HCM

review_title: Dayforce Provides An Innovative All-In-One Solution
description: I have been using Dayforce for almost 10 years. We still don't use all the modules (even though I would like to) but I hope we get there in the next few years. The features we currently use have positively impacted our efficiency and accountability. I greatly enjoyed attending the Insights conferences for several years and look forward to the new Discover Dayforce event this year. The FIT sessions, demonstrations, product updates, and opportunities to meet one-on-one with customer support reps are extremely valuable.
author: Sarah S.
pros: Everything is in one place and they are constantly innovating by adding or updating features to manage the changing needs of employers and the workforce. I feel comfortable with their efforts to ensure the highest levels of compliance.
cons: Like every application there are little quirks and malfunctions from time to time. I have found Dayforce support to be helpful in these cases. Also, since it is such a robust system it can take a while to learn your way around, but the community and support portal provide needed resources.

review_title: Dayforce - Reliable, all-in-one package for the majority of your HCM needs
description: From the perspective of a system administrator, Dayforce is a reliable, thorough HRIS/HCM package that touches all major items in an employees lifecycle - Ongoing maintenance can be time consuming, but the overall experience for end users is worth it. Onboarding, Recruitment, Engagement and scheduling are best in class modules and worth the effort to implement.
author: Shaun W.
pros: All in one, start to finish employee lifecycle solution Onboarding and recruitment modules are leaders in the field Ability to thoroughly cover payroll and scheduling compliance for both Australia and New Zealand Both custom forms and workflows create genuine ability to fill any gaps you find in processes. Customer Success Management genuinely fights for their clients Uptime and environment support is reliable Integration options are vast and reliable
cons: Upgrade cadence is too frequent, leaving me chasing my tail as an admin General support without escalation can be slow at times Some modules are still North American Focused (Benefits and Compensation specifically)

description: Great overall experience clearing bugs and issues was easy and the customer support was top notch and easy to access
author: Yewande O.
pros: I got value for money as it captured all relevant candidate information, and it was easy to use and navigate different modules. Dayforce had good customer support
cons: Payroll software was cumbersome, and made me tired of working on Payroll related task, I struggled with understanding Payroll dynamics

review_title: Great for Time Punching + Tracking Your Hours
description: Made clocking in and out a breeze. Positive overall experience with managing PTO and time off requests. Would recommend this app for small and moderately sized businesses (15 - 250 employees)
author: Ashley K.
pros: User interface was generally easy to navigate. Clocking in and out was easy as well. You have the ability to set up a range area making it capable to clock in in the parking lot, or anywhere near the building. Time saving for sure!
cons: There were some app updates at the time I was using the app that would make it difficult to submit time off requests, but after a month or so the problem resolved.

description: I have used Dayforce for over five years and participated in many intensive integration projects. I learned from each project, and I find Dayforce HCM easy to navigate.
author: STEPHANIE C.
pros: Dayforce HCM has all HR, benefits, WFM, report, and payroll in one place and is easy to navigate once you understand the system. The Dayforce support team is excellent, and they are always ready to assist you whenever you need help.
cons: The Dayforce HCM has greatly improved its Reports and Analytics functions, but I would appreciate having more report specialists to support the reports.

review_title: Dayforce HCM App is user friendly
description: Overall I like how the different parts of the app are laid out. It is easy to access the different areas, and you don't need to click through multiple things to find the information you are looking for. I also found using the different sections of the app straight forward which was appreciated by someone who is not the most tech savy.
author: Amanda M.
pros: User friendly interface. I am able to easily locate and access the different parts of the app when needed.
cons: When looking at the daily schedule for my team I am not able to see all team members working that day, only the ones in the same role/position as me.

description: My overall experience has been positive because of the knowledge and expertise with the Dayforce support team.
author: Phoebe B.
pros: The support team for Dayforce is outstanding. I do not know my way around Dayfoce too much, but I can get by because I am experience with payroll and human resource... Anyhow, the support team is so helpful.
cons: I guess the con for me is that I am not that experience with handling a Canada payroll. But again, the customer support makes it a great experience.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Everything in one place, easy to use, good reporting.
cons: Additional costs for each module is high. Customer service has suffered since COVID.

description: Like I said, it got the job done, but it wasn't my favorite platform.
author: Joe G.
pros: This platform did what it needed to do, and it was nice to have an all-in-one platform for hiring, payroll changes, and time clocks.
cons: This platform wasn't precisely the most organized. It wasn't too difficult to navigate, but everything was everywhere.

description: it has been great! I have enjoyed getting to learn about the program and it's abilities.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Seamless transition between recruiting to hiring to onboarding to scheduling to payroll. It all works well together.
cons: Dayforce has some limitations for our company but there is always the ability to make suggestions for improvement.

author: Wyatt M.
pros: User friendly - generally our processes integrate well with the functionality available
cons: Some things that should be free are billable, such as using a standard system generated form and not having access to edit it without paying

review_title: Dayforce- Helps all your People Needs
author: Chelsea S.
pros: Dayforce has all the solutions you need to manage your workforce and keep them engaged. From the core services such as payroll and benefits, to a slew of talent modules to help with recruiting, onboarding, and much more.
cons: Dayforce can be very technical if you want to keep things customized to your company. So having someone on the technical side in your company, managing and maintain configurations may be needed.

description: My overall experience with Dayforce is really good
author: Mohammed Hareez S.
pros: We use Dayforce for clock in and to see the data of our worksheet and its really fast and convenient
cons: The least i like about Dayforce is its not well organized

description: My overall experience the past few years using Dayforce has been steady, I have had issues uploading my Schedules into my Phone Calendar in the past, but Dayforce makes this really easy.
author: Michelle C.
pros: Dayforce is very reliable and it updates on time. I love all the information I have access to through Dayforce as well.
cons: There is nothing I dislike about Dayforce.

description: Having 3 countries live is hard but I wish we could do more for the simple items. For example, ROE in Canada, mainstream it instead of putting it in Payroll only.
author: Christin C.
pros: The live payroll information. Being able to see a moment in time pay check. No wait needed.
cons: The color, it's all white and it gets a little to bright. We need an option to switch to dark mode.

author: Demetra K.
pros: Dayforce allows us to house all HR, Payroll, and Benefit information in one place. It offers fun features like HUB, and TeamRelate.
cons: Our industry is complex and team members have many different jobs. Work assignments in Dayforce can be difficult to work with given our complex circumstances.
